T0127.title: Pig Target
T0127.definition: A derogatory term used internally by fraud rings to refer to scam targets and victims, treating them as livestock ready for slaughter.
T0127.description: Throughout the fraud chain, victims are thoroughly objectified and seen as “pigs” that can generate profit. From the moment a target is identified, fraudsters view them as animals to be fattened, showing no empathy whatsoever. This label reflects the extreme callousness and dehumanization that characterize the internal culture of these criminal operations.
T0127.usageExample: This pig has been raised for two months; it’s finally time to slaughter it—prepare to close the net.
